2141300.name: Road to Vostok Demo
2141300.description:
Road to Vostok Demo

Road to Vostok is a long-term survival game project and the goal of this demo is to test the initial gameplay loop and get player feedback before the early access version.

This demo is only for testing purposes, it does not represent the final quality of the game.

Demo Features

  • Realistic FPS mechanics

  • Physics-based loot

  • Hostile AI's & factions

  • Map-to-Map travel

  • Permadeath zone

  • Shelter customization

  • Trading & Tasks

  • Day & Night cycle

  • Dynamic weather

  • Summer & Winter
2141300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
